t1.promptTranslation: Selamat pagi (se-la-mat pa-gee). Ke mana (ke ma-na)? — Good morning. To where?

t2a.prompt: Hotel itu, ya? Tambang dua puluh ringgit.
t2a.promptTranslation: Hotel itu, ya (ya)? Tambang (tahm-bahng) dua puluh (doo-ah poo-looh) ringgit (reeng-git). — That hotel, right? The fare is twenty ringgit.

t2b.prompt: Pasar? Baiklah. Tambang lima belas ringgit.
t2b.promptTranslation: Pasar (pa-sar)? Baiklah (baik-lah). Tambang lima belas (lee-ma be-las) ringgit. — The market? Okay. The fare is fifteen ringgit.

t2c.prompt: Stesen bas? Tambang dua puluh lima ringgit.
t2c.promptTranslation: Stesen bas (ste-sen bas)? Tambang dua puluh lima (doo-ah poo-looh lee-ma) ringgit. — The bus station? The fare is twenty-five ringgit.

t2d.prompt: Sila beritahu alamat. Tambang tiga puluh ringgit.
t2d.promptTranslation: Sila (see-la) beritahu (be-ree-ta-hoo) alamat (ah-la-mat). Tambang tiga puluh (tee-ga poo-looh) ringgit. — Please tell the address. The fare is thirty ringgit.

t3.prompt: Baik. Kita jalan sekarang. Sudah sampai. Boleh bayar?
t3.promptTranslation: Baik (baik). Kita jalan (kee-ta ja-lan) sekarang (se-ka-rang). Sudah sampai (soo-dah sahm-pai). Boleh bayar (boh-leh ba-yar)? — Okay. We go now. We have arrived. Can you pay?

t4.prompt: Terima kasih. Ini baki anda. Selamat jalan!
t4.promptTranslation: Terima kasih (te-ree-ma ka-seeh). Ini baki (ba-kee) anda (ahn-da). Selamat jalan (se-la-mat ja-lan)! — Thank you. Here is your change. Have a safe trip!

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, boleh ulang? Saya tidak faham.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Maaf (mah-ahf), boleh ulang (boh-leh oo-lahng)? Saya tidak faham (sah-yah tee-dak fah-hahm). — Sorry, can you repeat? I don't understand.

t-end.promptTranslation: Terima kasih (te-ree-ma ka-seeh)! Selamat jalan (se-la-mat ja-lan)! — Thank you! Have a safe trip.
